name: Google People
description: This app integrates with Google People to support various generic and investigative actions

actions.name: List Other Contacts
actions.description: Lists all contacts that are not in a contact group

parameters.name: read_mask
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to be returned for each person. If not provided, default values will be used

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of contacts to include in the response

parameters.name: resource_name
parameters.description: Resource name of the "Other contact" to copy

parameters.name: copy_mask
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to be copied into the new contact

actions.name: List Directory
actions.description: Lists all contacts and profiles in the user's domain directory

parameters.name: read_mask
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to be returned for each person. If not provided, default values will be used

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of responses to include in the response

actions.name: Get User Profile
actions.description: Provides information about a person given account ID

parameters.name: resource_name
parameters.description: Resource name of the person to provide info about

parameters.name: person_fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to be returned for the person

parameters.name: person_fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to be returned for each person. If not provided, default values will be used

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of connections to include in the response
